name: intern-connect-ui
description: Tailwind CSS setup for Spring Boot

scripts.build: shx mkdir -p ../resources/static/dist/css ../resources/static/dist/js ../resources/static/dist/fonts && shx cp node_modules/bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css ../resources/static/dist/css/ && shx cp node_modules/bootstrap/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js ../resources/static/dist/js/ && shx cp node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font/bootstrap-icons.css ../resources/static/dist/css/ && shx cp node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font/fonts/* ../resources/static/dist/fonts/
